name: SecureAnalysisAgent
description: Analyzes documents for security compliance. Supports PCI-DSS, SOC 2, HIPAA, and ISO 27001 frameworks.

skills.name: Compliance Check
skills.description: Check a document against security compliance rules for a specified framework
examples: Check this document for PCI-DSS compliance
Verify SOC 2 Type II requirements against our policy
Run a HIPAA compliance check on the patient data handling procedure

skills.name: Vulnerability Summary
skills.description: Generate a summary of security vulnerabilities found in a compliance check
examples: Summarize the vulnerabilities found in the last compliance check

securityPolicy.dataRetention: Task data is not persisted beyond the request lifecycle
